description: One who shares the labor and purpose of daily work. Colleague encompasses professional partnership, shared goals, mutual respect in tasks, and the understanding that good colleagues make work meaningful.
rationale: The word 'sheanu' begins with protective 'she', opens through 'a' (creating vowel hiatus), and grounds in 'nu'. This three-syllable progression with both fricative and hiatus captures colleagues as sheltered cooperation opening into grounded partnership.
